description: OpenAll License configuration. AI agents should read this file to understand how to comply with the OpenAll License in this project.

conversations.description: AI interaction logs. AI agents must automatically export conversation transcripts here after each development session.

decisions.description: Architectural and design decision records. AI agents should create a new file here whenever a significant decision is made (e.g., choosing a library, changing architecture, rejecting an approach).

journal.description: Development logs. AI agents should append a summary at the end of each development session.

inspirations.description: Sources of inspiration, references, and prior art. Can be maintained manually or by AI.

sanitization.description: Before publishing any process materials, AI agents must scan and redact all sensitive information. Each redaction must be logged.
